name: PacificBridge Fulfillment - Japan
shortDescription: A precision-engineered fulfillment center supporting high-volume domestic shipments and premium export packaging for APAC markets.
description:
PacificBridge Fulfillment integrates advanced Japanese automation, including robotic shuttles, AGVs, and high-precision scanning systems. The facility supports domestic B2C fulfillment and export-grade packaging for APAC markets requiring strict quality control. Optimized for electronics, cosmetics, and small consumer goods, the center excels in low-defect, high-velocity operations. Its proximity to Haneda Airport enables rapid international dispatch and predictable lead times.

Working Hours (JST):
Mon-Fri: 08:00-21:00
Sat: 09:00-17:00
Sun: Closed
